action.reasoning: Observation: 100 epochs of DKT reached val_auc=0.7611 (best), but plateaued around epoch 40-50 at ~0.758. The model is clearly stuck in a local optimum. Analysis: The basic DKT with LSTM is limited. I should try a transformer-based approach (SAKT - Self-Attentive Knowledge Tracing) which typically outperforms LSTM-based DKT. Also, I should try: 1) larger model, 2) different input representation. The key issue is the model plateaued early. Let me implement SAKT with attention mechanism which should give better performance. Also, I notice the best checkpoint was at epoch ~40 with 0.7611. Decision: Implement a transformer-based Knowledge Tracing model (similar to SAKT/AKT) with multi-head attention. This should significantly improve over LSTM-based DKT.
